metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.displayName: RetailShield - MFA Fatigue / Push Bombing Attack
properties.description: Detects repeated MFA push notification attempts against retail accounts, indicating an MFA fatigue (push bombing) attack. Correlates failed MFA events in SigninLogs. MITRE T1621.
properties.query:
// ============================================================
// RetailShield — MFA Fatigue / Push Bombing Detection Rule
// MITRE ATT&CK : T1621 — Multi-Factor Authentication Request Generation
// Tactic       : Credential Access
// Severity     : High
// Frequency    : Every 5 minutes | Lookback: 10 minutes
// Author       : Tanvir Farhad — ShieldTech Ltd, London
// Reference    : M&S / Co-op 2025 — Scattered Spider MFA fatigue technique
// ============================================================

let LookbackPeriod    = 10m;
let MFAPromptThresh   = 10;   // MFA prompts within lookback before fatigue alert
let FatigueSuccThresh = 5;    // failed MFA attempts before a success counts as fatigue-driven
let MFAResultCodes    = dynamic(["50074", "50076", "50079"]); // MFA required / prompt codes

// ── Step 1: High-velocity MFA prompt flood to a single account ───────────────
let MFAPromptFlood =
    SigninLogs
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where ResultType in (MFAResultCodes)
    | where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
    | summarize
        PromptCount   = count(),
        SourceIPs     = dcount(IPAddress),
        SourceIPList  = make_set(IPAddress, 10),
        Locations     = make_set(Location, 5),
        AppNames      = make_set(AppDisplayName, 5),
        FirstPrompt   = min(TimeGenerated),
        LastPrompt    = max(TimeGenerated)
        by UserPrincipalName, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | where PromptCount >= MFAPromptThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "MFAPromptFlood";

// ── Step 2: MFA success after fatigue spike — victim accepted under pressure ──
let FatigueAcceptance =
    MFAPromptFlood
    | join kind=inner (
        SigninLogs
        | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
        | where ResultType == "0"                     // successful sign-in
        | where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
        | project
            UserPrincipalName,
            SuccessTime    = TimeGenerated,
            SuccessIP      = IPAddress,
            SuccessCountry = Location,
            SuccessApp     = AppDisplayName
    ) on UserPrincipalName
    | where SuccessTime > LastPrompt
        and SuccessTime < LastPrompt + 15m           // accepted within 15 min of last prompt
    | extend ThreatSignal = "FatigueAcceptance";

// ── Step 3: Multi-IP prompt flood — distributed attack infrastructure ─────────
let DistributedMFAFlood =
    MFAPromptFlood
    | where SourceIPs >= 3                           // prompts from ≥3 different IPs
    | extend ThreatSignal = "DistributedMFAFlood";

// ── Step 4: Risky sign-in following MFA prompt flood ─────────────────────────
let RiskyPostMFA =
    MFAPromptFlood
    | join kind=inner (
        SigninLogs
        | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
        | where ResultType == "0"
        | where RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ("high", "medium")
        | project
            UserPrincipalName,
            RiskyTime     = TimeGenerated,
            RiskLevel     = RiskLevelDuringSignIn,
            RiskyIP       = IPAddress,
            RiskyLocation = Location
    ) on UserPrincipalName
    | where RiskyTime > LastPrompt
    | extend ThreatSignal = "RiskySigninPostMFAFlood";

// ── Step 5: Union all signals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
union
    (MFAPromptFlood
        | extend
            SuccessIP = "", SuccessCountry = "", SuccessApp = "",
            RiskLevel = "", RiskyIP = "", RiskyLocation = "",
            SuccessTime = datetime(null)),
    (FatigueAcceptance
        | extend
            RiskLevel = "", RiskyIP = "", RiskyLocation = ""),
    (DistributedMFAFlood
        | extend
            SuccessIP = "", SuccessCountry = "", SuccessApp = "",
            RiskLevel = "", RiskyIP = "", RiskyLocation = "",
            SuccessTime = datetime(null)),
    (RiskyPostMFA
        | extend
            SuccessIP = "", SuccessCountry = "", SuccessApp = "",
            SuccessTime = datetime(null))
| extend
    AlertSeverity   = "High",
    MitreTechnique  = "T1621",
    MitreTactic     = "Credential Access",
    PlaybookTrigger = "block_ip",
    RiskScore       = 85
| project
    Timestamp        = coalesce(FirstPrompt, RiskyTime),
    UserPrincipalName,
    ThreatSignal,
    PromptCount,
    SourceIPs,
    SourceIPList,
    Locations,
    AppNames,
    SuccessIP,
    SuccessCountry,
    RiskLevel,
    RiskyIP,
    AlertSeverity,
    MitreTechnique,
    MitreTactic,
    PlaybookTrigger,
    RiskScore
| order by Timestamp desc
